title: US-Iran ceasefire: JD Vance lands in Islamabad to lead talks amid fragile truce - watch
summary_full: US Vice President JD Vance is in Islamabad for critical talks with Iran, aiming to solidify a fragile ceasefire and pursue peace in the Middle East. The negotiations, brokered by Pakistan, face significant hurdles, including Iran's preconditions for a Lebanon ceasefire and asset release. Tensions remain high amid regional violence and economic disruption.
